subject: Private & Confidential
body:
Hello Jeffrey,

I’ve been giving much more thought to your case.  We were destined to meet. Perhaps not for the reasons you may think.

You are a man of science and numbers. I am an advocate of at-risk victims. We approach issues and problems from different directions in order to find solutions.

Since we last spoke, July 2010, much water has crossed under the bridge.

I still would like to talk with you and learn your side of the story.

Thank you.

I’m not sure if you are a spiritual or religious person. If you are give yourself over to God. He is Almighty in every way.

Conchita

Conchita Sarnoff
Executive Director 
Alliance to Rescue Victims of Trafficking
atrvt.org
Tel: 202 355 3858
